project.name: VulnSignal
project.description: CVE and KEV trend intelligence from authoritative sources

coverage.notice: This product uses data from the NVD API and feeds but is not endorsed or certified by the NVD.

llmDiscovery.label: Publicly reported LLM-assisted CVEs
llmDiscovery.basis: Highest non-overlapping first-party CVE program count; program totals are not summed. CVE, NVD, and KEV have no standardized discovery-method field.

programReports.exclusionReason: Program counts are not summed because public aggregates do not provide a cross-program deduplication key.

comparison.causalityNote: Descriptive era comparison only; it does not establish that LLMs caused a change.
